evals.prompt:
Rewrite this paragraph to sound more natural and less AI-generated:

In today's rapidly evolving technological landscape, it's important to note that artificial intelligence is fundamentally transforming the way we approach software development. This paradigm shift represents a significant opportunity for organizations to leverage cutting-edge tools to streamline their workflows and enhance productivity. By embracing these innovative solutions, teams can unlock unprecedented levels of efficiency.
evals.expected_output: A rewritten paragraph that removes AI filler openers, replaces overused AI vocabulary (leverage, paradigm shift, unprecedented, cutting-edge, innovative, streamline, enhance), breaks formulaic structure, and sounds like a human wrote it.

assertions.text: The rewritten text does not start with 'In today's rapidly evolving' or any similar throat-clearing opener.
The rewritten text avoids the words 'leverage', 'paradigm shift', 'unprecedented', 'cutting-edge', 'innovative', 'streamline', and 'enhance' (or their variants).
The rewritten text uses specific, concrete language instead of vague generalities (e.g., names a specific change rather than 'fundamentally transforming').
The rewritten text varies sentence length rather than using three similarly-structured sentences in a row.

evals.prompt:
Edit this email draft to sound less robotic:

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to reach out to discuss a potential collaboration opportunity. Our team has been making significant strides in the blockchain space, and we believe there could be tremendous synergy between our organizations. I'd love to set up a call to explore how we might work together to create mutually beneficial outcomes. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.
evals.expected_output: A rewritten email that cuts the 'I hope this email finds you well' opener, removes corporate jargon (synergy, mutually beneficial outcomes, significant strides), and reads like a real person writing a real email.

assertions.text: The email does not contain 'I hope this email finds you well' or a similar formulaic greeting.
The email avoids the words 'synergy', 'mutually beneficial', 'significant strides', and 'don't hesitate to reach out'.
The email gets to the point quickly — the purpose of the email is clear within the first two sentences.

evals.prompt:
Humanize this product announcement:

We are thrilled to announce the launch of our groundbreaking new feature. This game-changing addition to our platform represents months of dedicated effort from our talented team. The feature seamlessly integrates with your existing workflow, providing a robust solution that empowers users to take their productivity to the next level. We're excited about the possibilities this unlocks and can't wait to see what you build with it.
evals.expected_output: A rewritten announcement that removes 'thrilled to announce', 'groundbreaking', 'game-changing', 'seamlessly integrates', 'robust solution', 'empowers', 'next level', 'unlocks', and sounds like a real company update rather than a template.

assertions.text: The announcement does not use 'thrilled', 'excited', 'groundbreaking', 'game-changing', or 'next level'.
The announcement describes what the feature actually does in concrete terms rather than using vague superlatives.
